rows.label: qev015102_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hm...? 
You're that ally of justice from before.
You look so pale... What in the world happened?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015102_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev015102_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask if he received a stuffed lobster
recently.

rows.label: qev015102_JNK0020
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev015102_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask if anything unusual has
happened around him recently.

rows.label: qev015102_MSG0002
rows.name: A stuffed lobster...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015102_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Ah, come to think of it, I was sent
a stuffed animal like that just a little while ago.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015102_MSG0004
rows.name:
It seems to be a gift from a citizen we rescued
during our last mission, but...
Is there something wrong with it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015102_MSG0005
rows.name:
No... not really?
Work is going well, and nothing particularly unusual has...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015102_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Ah, come to think of it, we were sent
a stuffed lobster from a citizen
we rescued.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015102_MSG0007
rows.name:
It was our first time receiving a gift like that,
so everyone was thrilled, but...
Is there something wrong with it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015102_MSG0008
rows.name:
...What!?
This is a bomb planted in NLA!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015102_MSG0009
rows.name:
There were 100 of them planted in NLA,
and you collected all of them!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015102_MSG0010
rows.name:
I see. If that's the case, please take it.
And as the one and only ally of justice,
deliver divine punishment to such a villain![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015102_MSG0011
rows.name:
...It seems you've obtained the final piece.
My preparations are flawless as well.
Now, let's finish this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015102_MSG0012
rows.name:
I am a defeated, foolish puppet...
I am in the base of those Definia.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015102_MSG0013
rows.name:
Hurry up and come!
Now is the time to show you
the true form of the Blood Lobster![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015102_JNK0030
rows.name: Disconnect

rows.label: qev015102_SEL0031
rows.name: Cut the transmission.

rows.label: qev015102_JNK0040
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev015102_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask the Blood Lobster who he
really is.

rows.label: qev015102_MSG0015
rows.name: ...Was that the criminal just now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015102_MSG0016
rows.name:
You absolutely cannot lose.
To me, you are the greatest hero.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev015102_MSG0017
rows.name:
Prove to me that, just like the stories I dreamed of,
the good will always triumph over the evil
in reality, too![ST:wait ]
